nodes.name: Standing
nodes.description: Neutral standing position. Starting point for all takedowns and guard pulls.

nodes.name: Single Leg
nodes.description: Clinch with one leg secured — drive through or trip to finish.

nodes.name: Double Leg
nodes.description: Shoot to both legs, drive opponent backward.

nodes.name: Guard Pull
nodes.description: Pull to closed or open guard from standing.

nodes.name: Closed Guard
nodes.description: Legs closed around opponent's waist. Fundamental guard.

nodes.name: Butterfly Guard
nodes.description: Hooks under opponent's thighs. Powerful sweep platform.

nodes.name: Open Guard
nodes.description: Legs off opponent, creating frames and distance.

nodes.name: Half Guard
nodes.description: One leg trapped between opponent's legs. Fight for underhook.

nodes.name: De La Riva
nodes.description: Hook around opponent's lead leg. Entry to berimbolo and leg attacks.

nodes.name: Spider Guard
nodes.description: Feet on biceps, gripping sleeves. Controls posture and sets sweeps.

nodes.name: X Guard
nodes.description: Both hooks under opponent creating X shape. Tilts and sweeps.

nodes.name: Leg Entanglements
nodes.description: 50/50, heel hooks, kneebars. High-percentage finishing position.

nodes.name: Side Control
nodes.description: Cross-body pin. Stable top position for submissions and transitions.

nodes.name: Mount
nodes.description: Sitting on opponent's chest. Most dominant ground position.

nodes.name: Knee on Belly
nodes.description: Knee on opponent's mid-section. Pressure and quick submission threats.

nodes.name: North South
nodes.description: Head-to-feet pin. Heavy pressure, kimura and choke threats.

nodes.name: Back Control
nodes.description: Hooks in, seatbelt grip. Most dominant finishing position.

nodes.name: Body Triangle
nodes.description: Legs locked in triangle around body. Unbreakable back control.

nodes.name: Turtle
nodes.description: Defensive turtle position. Protect against back takes.

techniques.name: Armbar from Closed Guard
techniques.description: Classic straight armbar attacking the elbow.

techniques.name: Triangle Choke
techniques.description: Leg triangle around neck and arm, cut the angle.

techniques.name: Guillotine from Guard
techniques.description: Head in guillotine, guard closed, squeeze finish.

techniques.name: Hip Bump Sweep
techniques.description: Sit up, bump hips, take top position.

techniques.name: Scissor Sweep
techniques.description: Scissor legs — one blocks hips, one hooks knee.

techniques.name: Pendulum Sweep
techniques.description: Kimura grip, swing legs to sweep opponent over.

techniques.name: Omoplata
techniques.description: Leg over shoulder lock, sweep or submit.

techniques.name: Flower Sweep (Gambarotto)
techniques.description: Collar and ankle grip sweep from closed guard.

techniques.name: Arm Drag to Back
techniques.description: Pull arm across body, take the back.

techniques.name: Elevator Sweep
techniques.description: Underhook, hook lifts leg — butterfly elevator.

techniques.name: Hook Sweep (Basic Butterfly)
techniques.description: Double underhooks, hook lifts and tips opponent.

techniques.name: Arm Drag from Butterfly
techniques.description: Arm drag to single leg or back exposure.

techniques.name: Double Overhook Sweep
techniques.description: Lock both overhooks, hip extension sweep.

techniques.name: De La Riva Sweep
techniques.description: DLR hook + sleeve grip, trip opponent's far leg.

techniques.name: Berimbolo
techniques.description: Invert under opponent, come up to the back.

techniques.name: Back Take from DLR
techniques.description: DLR to back exposure, secure seatbelt.

techniques.name: Spider Guard Sweep
techniques.description: Bicep control, triangle legs to tip sideways.

techniques.name: Triangle from Spider
techniques.description: Shoot triangle off spider guard.

techniques.name: Lasso Guard Entry
techniques.description: Wrap leg around arm to lasso, controlling posture.

techniques.name: X-Guard Tilt Sweep
techniques.description: X hooks, tilt opponent sideways to sweep.

techniques.name: X-Guard Stand-up Sweep
techniques.description: X hooks, lift opponent up and dump them.

techniques.name: Half Guard Underhook Sweep
techniques.description: Win underhook, come up to single leg.

techniques.name: Old School Sweep
techniques.description: Block far knee, take the back or sweep.

techniques.name: Z-Guard (Knee Shield)
techniques.description: Knee shield from half guard for frame.

techniques.name: Lockdown
techniques.description: Lock legs in figure-four, control opponent's hips.

techniques.name: Outside Heel Hook
techniques.description: Heel hook attacking the outside of the knee.

techniques.name: Inside Heel Hook
techniques.description: Heel hook attacking the inside of the knee.

techniques.name: Kneebar
techniques.description: Hyperextend opponent's knee with hip pressure.

techniques.name: Straight Ankle Lock
techniques.description: Reap the ankle, squeeze for Achilles pressure.

techniques.name: 50/50 Heel Hook
techniques.description: Heel hook from the 50/50 leg entanglement.

techniques.name: Single Leg Takedown
techniques.description: Secure one leg, drive or trip opponent down.

techniques.name: Double Leg Takedown
techniques.description: Shoot to both legs, drive through to mat.

techniques.name: Uchi Mata
techniques.description: Inner thigh throw, Judo classic.

techniques.name: Osoto Gari
techniques.description: Major outer reap, trip lead leg.

techniques.name: Hip Toss (Ogoshi)
techniques.description: Load opponent onto hips, rotate to throw.

techniques.name: Guard Pull Technique
techniques.description: Jump to guard, control sleeve and collar.

techniques.name: Americana from Side Control
techniques.description: Paintbrush grip, crank arm behind the back.

techniques.name: Kimura from Side Control
techniques.description: Figure-four on the wrist, rotate the shoulder.

techniques.name: North South Choke
techniques.description: Arm under neck, hip pressure — tight choke.

techniques.name: Kimura from North South
techniques.description: Figure-four from north south, rotate shoulder.

techniques.name: Armbar from Mount
techniques.description: S-mount, swing leg over head, extend hips.

techniques.name: Triangle from Mount
techniques.description: Shoot leg over for triangle setup from mount.

techniques.name: Ezekiel Choke
techniques.description: Gi sleeve grip choke from mount or guard.

techniques.name: Baseball Bat Choke
techniques.description: Two-handed collar grip, rotate to choke.

techniques.name: Armbar from KOB
techniques.description: Grab arm as opponent pushes knee, armbar.

techniques.name: Rear Naked Choke
techniques.description: Arm under chin, hand to bicep, squeeze.

techniques.name: Bow and Arrow Choke
techniques.description: Collar grip, pull collar + leg — gi finisher.

techniques.name: Collar Choke from Back
techniques.description: Four-finger collar grip, second hand behind neck.

techniques.name: Armbar from Back Control
techniques.description: Extend arm, roll to armbar when hooks lose.

techniques.name: Clock Choke from Turtle
techniques.description: Collar and ankle grip, roll opponent to choke.

techniques.name: Arm Drag from Turtle
techniques.description: Drag turtle's arm, take the back.

techniques.name: Granby Roll Escape
techniques.description: Roll over shoulder to escape turtle pressure.
